hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/types.ts" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts/types.ts" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/"*.ts "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts/" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts/" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tsconfig.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts/" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/package-lock.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts/" 2>/dev/null && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts" && npm install --silent 2>/dev/null && npx tsc 2>/dev/null) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/scripts/types.ts"
